title: DayView
description: Single-day view with an hourly grid. Ideal for detailed agendas, time blocks and operational planning.

props.events: Events to render in the hourly grid.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for headers and formats.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the top row for all-day events.
props.showNowPill: Shows a pill with the current time.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.allowRangeSelection: Allows selecting a range by dragging over empty slots.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible day changes.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to a new position.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Timed events rendered in the hourly grid.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and restricts the visible time range.

types.title: DayView
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the DayView component props. Supports modelValue, events, locale, color, radius, bordered, minDate, maxDate, businessHours, disabledTimeRanges, showHeader, showCurrentTime, format, slotMinutes, slotHeight, hourStart, hourEnd, showAllDayRow, draggableEvents, resizableEvents and allowRangeSelection.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the day view
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the day view; use Tab to navigate events and actions
